subcodes.first_line: The mention of the Book, from the servant unto him who hath believed in guidance and who hath held fast unto the Sure Handle in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر کتاب من العبد الی الذی آمن بالهدی و کان بالعروه الوثقی فی تلک الایام
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
